title: Drowned Drop Tridents
description: Changes the drop rates of tridents and the amount of drowns that spawn with a trident to the rates in Bedrock
body:
Tridents are very annoying to get in Java, while they are practically everywhere in bedrock. This datapack changes drowned to match the drowned in Bedrock by changing their drop chances and chance to spawn with tridents.
### **Changes**
- Trident drop Chances 8.5% --> 25%
- Drowned that spawn with tridents 6.25% (1 in 16) --> 15% (3 in 20)
- Drowned that spawn with fishing rod 3.75% --> .85%
